sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from s_notice_t where validflag>0
noticetype like '%$noticetype$%'
noticetitle like '%$noticetitle$%'
noticetext like '%$noticetext$%'

select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sdp.departname SEPARATOR ',') as departnames from( select sn.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id ORDER BY sf.id) as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName ORDER BY sf.id) as filenames FROM s_notice_t sn LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,sn.attachments) where sn.validflag>0
sn.noticetype like '%$noticetype$%'
sn.noticetitle like '%$noticetitle$%'
sn.noticetext like '%$noticetext$%'
GROUP BY sn.id )A LEFT JOIN sys_department_t sdp on FIND_IN_SET(sdp.id,A.departids) GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO s_notice_t (noticetype,noticetitle,noticetext,attachments,departids,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,updatetime) VALUES ('$noticetype$','$noticetitle$','$noticetext$','$attachments$','$departids$',$validflag$,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE s_notice_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select sn.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id ORDER BY sf.id) as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName ORDER BY sf.id) as filenames FROM s_notice_t sn LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,sn.attachments) where sn.validflag>0 and sn.id = $id$ GROUP BY sn.id

select A.* from(
select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, CONCAT('【级别调整-申请】',jc.applicant,'申请将',p.personname,'的联控级别从',jc.jointcontrollevel_old,'调整到',jc.jointcontrollevel_new,',待审核') as messagecontent, jc.applicanttime from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t jc LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p ON jc.personnelid=p.id where jc.examinestatus=1 UNION
select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, CONCAT('【通知公告-',noticetype,'】',noticetitle) as messagecontent, updatetime as applicanttime from s_notice_t where validflag>0 and FIND_IN_SET($departmentid$,departids) union select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, CONCAT('【二级标签-新增】',addoperator,'新申请人员属性标签：', (select t.attributelabel from p_attributelabel_t t where t.id=a.rootid),'-',attributelabel,',待审核') as messagecontent, addtime as applicanttime from p_attributelabel_t a where a.validflag>0 and a.examineflag=0 and FIND_IN_SET($departmentid$,(select t.departmentid from p_attributelabel_t t where t.id=a.rootid)) union select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, concat('【人员标签-新增】',e.addoperator,'申请给风险人员:',p.personname,',增加一级标签-',e.applylabel1name,',待审核') as messagecontent, e.addtime as applicanttime from p_personnel_applylabel_t e LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p ON e.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_attributelabel_t a on a.id=e.applylabel1 where e.examineflag=0 and e.validflag>0 and FIND_IN_SET($departmentid$,a.departmentid) union
select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, '无效的部门ID' as messagecontent, now() as applicanttime from dual where 1=0 union
select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, concat('【人员标签-审核】',e.addoperator,'申请给风险人员:',p.personname,',增加一级标签,已审核完成') as messagecontent, e.examinetime as applicanttime from p_personnel_applylabel_t e LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p ON e.personnelid=p.id where e.examineflag>0 and e.validflag>0 and e.addoperatorid=$addoperatorid$
union select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, concat('【情报线索-已到预计发生时间】【标题】',ltitle) as messagecontent, ldate as applicanttime from( select * from e_leadsinfo_t where validflag>0 and ldate>DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(now(),INTERVAL 3 day),'%Y-%m-%d') and DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')>=ldate)A left join e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id=A.cdtid where ct.validflag>0 and ct.sponsor=$departmentid$ union select NULL as id, NULL as personnelid, NULL as messageType, concat('【稳控化解情况-已到预计落实时间】【风险名称】',ct.cdtname) as messagecontent, lsdate as applicanttime from( select * from e_defuseinfo_t where validflag>0 and lsdate>DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(now(),INTERVAL 3 day),'%Y-%m-%d') and DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')>=lsdate)A left join e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id=A.cdtid where ct.validflag>0 and ct.sponsor=$departmentid$ union /* 新增案件提醒（从p_case_police_message_t表查询） */ SELECT m.id as id, m.personnelid as personnelid, m.message_type as messageType, m.message_content as messagecontent, m.addtime as applicanttime FROM p_case_police_message_t m WHERE m.validflag > 0 AND m.read_flag = 0 AND m.message_type = 'aj' AND m.department_id = $departmentid$ AND m.addtime >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') union /* 新增警情提醒（从p_case_police_message_t表查询） */ SELECT m.id as id, m.personnelid as personnelid, m.message_type as messageType, m.message_content as messagecontent, m.addtime as applicanttime FROM p_case_police_message_t m WHERE m.validflag > 0 AND m.read_flag = 0 AND m.message_type = 'jj' AND m.department_id = $departmentid$ AND m.addtime >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') ) as A order by A.applicanttime desc
